text: Walking through this space dedicated to research and development, I feel invigorated by the sense of purpose and human ingenuity on display. The design and technology intertwine, urging me to ponder how we shape, and are shaped by, our inventions. The sterile brightness and clear glass feel both inviting and exposing—an arena where ideas are bared for scrutiny and collaboration. There is a quiet anticipation, as though I am about to witness or uncover something new about the human-machine partnership.
